testcase.name: runScenario["Enterprise E2E validation combining UI, API, Data, and Performance", "Capstone Omni-Channel Validation Engine"](1)

failure.message: Cannot run program "C:\Users\harsh\Downloads\apache-jmeter-5.6.3\apache-jmeter-5.6.3\bin\jmeter.bat": CreateProcess error=2, The system cannot find the file specified

UI Login Successful! Triggering JMeter... &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI execute a UI login on SauceDemo via Selenium Grid&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.OmniSteps.executeUILogin()&amp#27;[0m Firing JMeter Performance Test... &amp#27;[31mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[31mI stress test the backend infrastructure using JMeter&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m#
